title: Private Sound Sessions
alt: Hands playing a crystal singing bowl beside a reclining participant
description: Individual restorative sessions are available for anyone seeking intentional rest, whether you're navigating seasons of depletion, transition, recovery, burnout, grief, or simply longing for a quiet space to slow down and reconnect. Private group sound baths are available for small gatherings, retreats, wellness spaces, families, or groups of friends seeking a shared restorative experience.
